UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's basic profile information, serving as the central identity for accessing platform features.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address, used for identification and communication.

displayName.description: A user-friendly name displayed publicly on the platform.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

settingsId.description: Reference to the UserSettings entity, storing user-specific preferences. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 UserSettings)

AIStudio.title: AIStudio
AIStudio.description: Defines a specific AI-powered studio or tool available on the LuxAI Platform, such as SmartFolio or a Music studio.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIStudio entity.

name.description: The descriptive name of the AI studio (e.g., 'DLX SmartFolio', 'Music Studio').

description.description: A brief explanation of the AI studio's purpose and functionality.

status.description: The current operational status of the AI studio, indicating its availability.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the AI studio definition was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the AI studio definition was last updated.

SmartFolioReport.title: SmartFolioReport
SmartFolioReport.description: Stores the results and associated metadata of an AI-generated investment insight report from the DLX SmartFolio studio.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SmartFolioReport entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who generated this report. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SmartFolioReport)

studioId.description: Reference to the AIStudio, specifically the DLX SmartFolio. (Relationship: AIStudio 1:N SmartFolioReport)

inputDataSummary.description: A summary or representation of the financial data provided by the user for this report.

reportContent.description: The AI-generated portfolio insights, risk analysis, or investment strategy suggestions, potentially as a JSON string.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the SmartFolio report was generated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the SmartFolio report was last updated.

AIAgentPersona.title: AIAgentPersona
AIAgentPersona.description: Defines an AI agent's personality, role, and capabilities for interactive chat experiences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIAgentPersona entity.

name.description: The name of the AI agent persona (e.g., 'Lux', 'Architect').

description.description: A detailed description of the agent's purpose, background, and expertise.

role.description: The specific role or function the AI agent is designed to perform (e.g., 'Financial Advisor', 'Software Developer').

capabilities.description: A summary of the agent's specific capabilities or the types of tasks it can assist with.

status.description: The current operational status of the AI agent persona.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the AI agent persona was defined.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the AI agent persona was last updated.

AIConversation.title: AIConversation
AIConversation.description: Represents a single chat session between a user and an AI agent persona.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIConversation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who participated in this conversation. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AIConversation)

agentPersonaId.description: Reference to the AIAgentPersona involved in this conversation. (Relationship: AIAgentPersona 1:N AIConversation)

title.description: An automatically generated or user-provided title summarizing the conversation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the conversation was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the conversation was last updated or a message was added.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Stores individual messages within an AI chat conversation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

conversationId.description: Reference to the AIConversation this message belongs to. (Relationship: AIConversation 1:N ChatMessage)

senderType.description: Indicates whether the message was sent by the user or the AI agent.

content.description: The actual text content of the chat message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating the exact moment the message was sent.

UserSettings.title: UserSettings
UserSettings.description: Contains customizable preferences and settings for a specific user on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSettings entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile these settings belong to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 UserSettings)

notificationSettings.description: A JSON string or similar structure storing detailed notification preferences (e.g., enable/disable email updates, in-app alerts).

securityPreferences.description: A JSON string or similar structure storing non-sensitive, security-related preferences (e.g., multi-factor authentication preferences, but not actual secrets).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user settings were initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user settings were last updated.

NewsArticle.title: NewsArticle
NewsArticle.description: Represents an article or announcement displayed in the platform's news feed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NewsArticle entity.

title.description: The headline or title of the news article.

content.description: The full body content of the news article, potentially supporting rich text or markdown.

publishDate.description: The date and time when the news article was published and made visible.

author.description: The name or identifier of the author who wrote or published the article.

category.description: The category the news article belongs to (e.g., 'Platform Update', 'AI Research', 'Event').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the news article entry was initially created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the news article entry was last updated.

LabProject.title: LabProject
LabProject.description: Manages experimental AI projects and features within the Labs Hub, including their status and assignments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LabProject entity.

name.description: The name of the experimental AI project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project's objectives, scope, and expected outcomes.

status.description: The current development status of the experimental project.

startDate.description: The planned or actual start date of the project.

endDate.description: The planned or actual end date of the project (optional).

assignedAgentPersonaIds.description: An array of references to AIAgentPersona entities assigned to work on or be part of this project. (Relationship: LabProject N:N AIAgentPersona)

progressNotes.description: A field for ongoing notes, updates, and milestones related to the project's progress.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the lab project entry was initially created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the lab project entry was last updated.

definition.description: Stores basic user profile information. The 'userId' in the path corresponds to the authenticated user's ID (request.auth.uid).
Stores user-specific preferences and settings. The 'userId' in the path corresponds to the authenticated user's ID (request.auth.uid).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (Firebase Authentication UID).

definition.description: Defines available AI studios or tools. These documents are publicly readable.

params.name: studioId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI studio.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated investment reports for a specific user. Includes denormalized 'userId' matching the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who generated the report (Firebase Authentication UID).

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SmartFolio report.

definition.description: Defines AI agent personas for chat interactions. These documents are publicly readable.

params.name: agentPersonaId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI agent persona.

definition.description: Represents individual chat sessions between a user and an AI agent. Includes denormalized 'userId' matching the path for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the conversation (Firebase Authentication UID).

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI conversation.

definition.description: Stores individual messages within a user's AI chat conversation. Includes denormalized 'userId' from the parent conversation for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the conversation (Firebase Authentication UID).

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent AI conversation.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat message.

definition.description: Represents articles and announcements for the platform's news feed. These documents are publicly readable.

params.name: articleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the news article.

definition.description: Manages experimental AI projects and features within the Labs Hub. These documents are publicly readable for status and roadmap information.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the lab project.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable authorization by strictly adhering to the core design principles and strategy mandates. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This structure achieves Authorization Independence primarily through two mechanisms:
1.  **Path-Based Ownership:** For all user-specific data (e.g., `UserProfile`, `UserSettings`, `SmartFolioReport`, `AIConversation`, `ChatMessage`), documents are nested directly under a user's unique ID (`/users/{userId}/...`). This inherently ties ownership to the document path, allowing security rules to directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` wildcard in the path. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls to a parent document to determine ownership.
2.  **Denormalization for Nested Data:** For nested subcollections where parent data might influence child access (e.g., `ChatMessage` under `AIConversation`), the `userId` (owner) is explicitly denormalized into *each* `ChatMessage` document. This means a security rule for `/users/{userId}/ai_conversations/{conversationId}/messages/{messageId}` can directly check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` without performing a `get()` on the parent `ai_conversations/{conversationId}` document. This ensures atomic authorization checks for all document operations, including nested ones.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure facilitates secure `list` operations by implementing:
1.  **Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):** Publicly readable collections (`ai_studios`, `ai_agent_personas`, `news_articles`, `lab_projects`) are kept at the root level. All documents within these collections share the same public read access policy, making `list` operations inherently secure without needing client-side filtering or complex server-side rule logic to filter results. 
2.  **Path-Based Scope for User Data:** For private user data, the `list` operations are implicitly scoped by the user's ID in the path (e.g., `/users/{userId}/smart_folio_reports`). A user can only `list` reports under their specific `userId` path, and the rules enforce that `request.auth.uid` must match that `{userId}`. This prevents users from performing a broad `list` across all `smart_folio_reports` and attempting to filter for their own, thus upholding the QAP principle that rules should prevent unauthorized access, not filter results for the client. Any attempt to `list` a collection that is not owned by the requesting user will be denied by the rules at the collection level.
